title: Fools First
writer: Marion Fairfax, Hugh McNair Kahler, Hugh Wiley
actors: Richard Dix, Claire Windsor, Claude Gillingwater
plot: Tommy Frazer, a product of Hell's Kitchen, is sentenced to a prison term for forgery; upon his release, he meets Ann Whittaker, a bank clerk, and they decide to rob the bank where she works. She obtains references whereby Tommy is...
